stack: rust-workspace (axum 0.8, sqlx, pgrx, wasmtime) — established, not under evaluation
candidates_empty_reason: No build-vs-adopt decisions arose. Every gap identified by assess+analyze is a defect (pg_cron amd64 link failure), a configuration default (FLINT_CHANGE_SOURCE fails open to an empty stream), a missing governance document (SECURITY.md, SUPPORT.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md), or absent infrastructure (staging for load validation). None are library-shaped. Fabricating candidates to populate this schema would be dishonest.

research_budget.stopped_early_reason: Tier-4 web research returned no actionable, product-specific intelligence (SMB disaster-recovery listicles, RLS explainers, competitor-comparison SEO). Continuing to spend budget would not have changed any verdict. Repository evidence was specific and checkable; web evidence was not.

blocking_open_question: What is being sold, and to whom? Self-hosted OSS vs managed SaaS vs licensed on-prem have disjoint readiness bars. Spec stage cannot proceed without this answer.

verdicts.gap: realtime default returns empty stream with Ok
k6 never runs as a gate
verdicts.note: needs staging infrastructure that does not exist
